episodes.name: Customs vs Popat
episodes.overview: Amid mounting pressure to curb smuggling at Mumbai airport, officer Prakash Kumar takes charge and ends Arjun Meena's suspension so he can lead the team.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/1z6vcbtxr0su/taskaree-the-smugglers-web-s01e01-customs-vs-popat-720p-nf-web-dl-hindi-aac5-1-h-264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Bada Choudhary
episodes.overview: Arjun forms his A-Team with formerly suspended officers Mitali and Ravinder, as Prakash tasks them with taking down the Bada Choudhary syndicate.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/fxbz23to03n3/taskaree-the-smugglers-web-s01e02-bada-choudhary-720p-nf-web-dl-hindi-aac5-1-h-264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: The Priya Story
episodes.overview: Caught smuggling gold by Arjun, flight attendant Priya goes undercover for him. The World Customs Conference offers a chance to trap the smugglers.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/jv02cv6kjmiw/taskaree-the-smugglers-web-s01e03-the-priya-story-720p-nf-web-dl-hindi-aac5-1-h-264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Operation Longshot
episodes.overview: The customs team mounts a large-scale sting to intercept gold smugglers converging on Mumbai. Bada Choudhary senses something is wrong.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/v9ybh7rzwtpz/taskaree-the-smugglers-web-s01e04-operation-longshot-720p-nf-web-dl-hindi-aac5-1-h-264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Hum Coin Hain
episodes.overview: Prakash is sent to Bangkok, where he meets an unexpected visitor. The search of a suspect's home leads the officers to a troubling incident.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/yd63f5d38e3v/taskaree-the-smugglers-web-s01e05-hum-coin-hain-720p-nf-web-dl-hindi-aac5-1-h-264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Darr Ka Dhandha
episodes.overview: The Choudhary syndicate strikes back with violence and intimidation against the customs officers. Ravinder's reckless move drags him deeper into trouble.
episodes.watch: <iframe src="https://bysebuho.com/e/4hwzqsnefzba/taskaree-the-smugglers-web-s01e06-darr-ka-dhandha-720p-nf-web-dl-hindi-aac5-1-h-264-daniewatch-is" frameborder="0" marginwidth="0" marginheight="0" scrolling="no" width="640" height="360" allowfullscreen></iframe>

episodes.name: Kahani Khatam
episodes.overview: Arjun gets crucial information from Srikant Saxena. As the syndicate tries one final gold smuggling run, can the officers stop them before it's too late?
